query: SELECT id, title, category, tags FROM insights WHERE category = 'Industry Focus' OR tags LIKE '%Semiconductor%' LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 5DX9DXKuVqxA9jr.15b4f38c7c58 --database 9wsYutxKhSEzLK7XGG22CU --execute SELECT id, title, category, tags FROM insights WHERE category = 'Industry Focus' OR tags LIKE '%Semiconductor%' LIMIT 10;
